case_title: KEN ZHANG CHEN VS. ZHI F LAO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, KEN ZHANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAO, ZHI F $1,475.41 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,560.41, DEFENDANT ZHI F. LAO NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
